full_text:
IN PHOTOS: Mumbai’s daily battle with the sun
The city is right in the middle of a killing heatwave, and Mumbaikars are tackling it in the best way they can. mid-day’s SAYYED SAMEER ABEDI, SATEJ SHINDE, and ASHISH RAJE bring you the scenes from across the city.

Residents of Garib Nagar in Bandra East step out of their corrugated iron-sheet homes to find relief from the stifling heat that lingers into the night. PICS/SATEJ SHINDE
